{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Mon family
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Mon family]] would hold [[Lindon]] responsible for Teris.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] fought with the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
